name: Arnold TradingView Overlay
description: Closed-trade widgets render reliably — unified geometry (anchor at entry, stopLevel from original 1R, profitLevel from planned 2R) so TV's stricter 2026-05-08 widget validator stops rejecting wins (old win-mode set stopLevel=0 → 'Value is undefined'). Fancy infoBlocks/compact/profitBackground props are applied via setProperties post-create with try/catch so any single rejected field doesn't take down the widget. Earlier: original 1R stop band always visible + separate dashed trail line at the actually-placed stop, 5-step heatmap zone palette, hierarchy<0.5 paint threshold, promise-rejection labels in /api/tv-overlay/debug, pyramid size in header, halt amber recolor, exit_reason suffix.
